name: Redox Limited
analysis: RDX's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 1% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$3.9800. Trade idea: entry A$4.0500, stop A$3.5541, target A$5.5377 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
